name: Thai Stuffed Crab
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tablespoon Cilantro roots (Subst., 2 tsp chopped stems)
3 tablespoons Golden Mount or Maggi sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crab meat, pork, shrimps, garlic, pepper, cilantro roots, and Golden Mount sauce well.
2. Stuff the mixture into each crab shell and pack tightly.
3. Sprinkle chopped cilantro leaves and red chilies on top.
4. Bring a large pot of water to a rapid boil in a steamer.
5. Arrange the stuffed crab shells in the steamer.
6. Place several layers of paper towels on top of the steamer, not the food, and replace the cover.
7. Steam for 20 minutes, then turn off heat and let cool slightly.
8. Beat the egg in a small bowl.
9. In a large wok, heat oil over medium-high heat.
10. Dip the stuffed crab in the egg, meat side down, and fry until golden brown.
11. Remove from oil and drain well.
12. Cool slightly and serve immediately.
13. Serve with Thai Sriracha chili sauce as an appetizer. Makes 4 servings.
